div.class: o_grid_item o_cc o_cc3 g-height-5 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-center text-center
div.style: grid-area: 1 / 1 / 6 / 4; z-index: 1; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--o-color-4) -400%, var(--o-color-2) 100%);

div.class: o_grid_item o_cc o_cc2 g-height-5 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-center text-center
o_grid_item o_cc o_cc2 g-height-5 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-center text-center
o_grid_item o_cc o_cc4 g-height-5 g-col-lg-3 col-lg-3 justify-content-center text-center
div.style: grid-area: 6 / 4 / 11 / 7; z-index: 4; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--o-color-4) -400%, var(--o-color-1) 100%);

div.class: o_grid_item o_grid_item_image g-height-10 g-col-lg-6 col-lg-6 text-center
